nodes.name: Silver-crowned friarbird
nodes.summary: The silver-crowned friarbird (Philemon argenticeps) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae.It is endemic to northern Australia, including Queensland. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References

nodes.name: Philemon
nodes.summary: Philemon（Philemon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联16种鸟类，如小吮蜜鳥、Meyer's friarbird、Timor friarbird等16种鸟类。
